views.markdown: A pure-software wireless CarPlay receiver for jailbroken iPads. Showcase lets a supported iPad appear as a CarPlay car, receives the encrypted H.264 screen stream, and sends touch input back to the iPhone.

- Cellular iPad with Personal Hotspot available
- Active SIM or carrier provisioning for Personal Hotspot
- Rootful iOS 12-14 or rootless iOS 15-17
- Bundled BTstack runtime files
- OpenSSL libssl3 package

Showcase takes over classic Bluetooth while it is running, then restores Apple's bluetoothd when stopped. Beta 2-13 makes Wi-Fi provisioning one-shot per iAP2 session to avoid duplicate 0x5703 state-machine churn.

- Sends 0x5703 AccessoryWiFiConfigurationInformation only once per RFCOMM/iAP2 session
- Suppresses duplicate 0x5702 Wi-Fi config requests after the first 0x5703 has been sent
- Adds state logs around 0x5702, 0x4E0D, 0x4E0E, and duplicate suppression for tester pcaps
- Keeps 0x4301 disabled and keeps the beta 2-12 active multicast mDNS announcer
- Rootless package only for this release; rootful stays on beta 2-8

- Sends active multicast mDNS announcements for _airplay._tcp and _raop._tcp on 224.0.0.251:5353 during the handoff window
- Includes PTR, SRV, TXT, and A records for the receiver, with the bridge100 address advertised as the host address
- Keeps the beta 2-11 bridge100 packet capture and Send Network Dump workflow
- Targets senders that join Personal Hotspot but do not actively query _airplay._tcp afterward
- Rootless package only for this release; rootful stays on beta 2-8

- Re-announces _airplay._tcp and _raop._tcp TXT records every 3 seconds for 5 minutes after network services start
- Starts a bridge100 pcap automatically when the app reaches Connect from your iPhone
- Adds Send Network Dump in the info sheet, separate from the normal diagnostics tar
- Adds tcpdump as a rootless dependency so packet capture is available after installation
- Rootless package only for this release; rootful stays on beta 2-8

- Disables the undeclared 0x4301 CarPlayStartSession path by default on rootless builds
- Keeps the standard 0x5703 Wi-Fi provisioning plus Bonjour/AirPlay handoff path
- Targets the post-Wi-Fi-provisioning failure where the iPhone never appears on bridge100 and never connects to AirPlay port 7000
- Preserves the beta 2-9 rootless BTstack Secure Connections fix
- Rootless package only for this release; rootful stays on beta 2-8

- Disables Secure Connections (SC) in the bundled BTstack daemon, fixing Bluetooth authentication failure on BT 4.2+ devices (iPhone 6s and newer)
- Root cause: BTstack wrote Write_SC_Host_Support while SSP was off, which Broadcom chips accepted silently but applied incorrectly, causing the remote iPhone to negotiate P-256 SC pairing that then failed at the LMP layer
- Forces legacy SSP (P-192 ECDH) for all pairing, which works reliably across all tested controllers
- Rootless package only for this release; rootful stays on beta 2-8

- Changes the bundled rootless BTdaemon SSP persona to DisplayYesNo with dedicated bonding, matching a display-capable CarPlay accessory instead of a NoInputNoOutput peer
- Targets the Bluetooth authentication failure seen after SDP, where the iPhone returned Simple Pairing Complete status 0x05 before RFCOMM opened
- Keeps BTdaemon auto-accept enabled, so testers do not need to type a pairing code
- Improves Send Log package-state capture by using dpkg-query directly on rootless systems
- Keeps the iOS 12-14 rootful package and the iOS 15-17 rootless package on beta 2-8

- Adds Send Log in the info sheet, with a shareable tar archive containing Showcase logs, BTstack HCI packet dumps, package state, process list, interfaces, launchd state, and install metadata
- Enables BTstack PacketLogger capture by default before the Bluetooth daemon starts, so future compatibility reports include /tmp/hci_dump.pklg
- Fixes rootless Bluetooth pairing noise by leaving HCI accept, IO-capability, and confirmation replies to BTdaemon on Dopamine
- Adds clearer Bluetooth-side logs for disconnect reasons, pairing events, encryption state, RFCOMM, and SDP bring-up
- Keeps the iOS 12-14 rootful package and the iOS 15-17 rootless package on beta 2-7

- Official Dopamine rootless compatibility for iOS 15-17 on arm64 devices, with the patched BTstack daemon bundled in the package
- iPhone receiver UI polish: native iPhone layout, fullscreen Active video, pinch reveal for info and close controls, and cleaner loading-state spacing
- Rootless Bluetooth path reaches end-to-end pairing, RFCOMM, iAP2, BAA authentication, AirPlay handoff, and H.264 stream startup
- Improved session resilience when briefly leaving the app and when encrypted AirPlay channels sit idle
- Rootful iOS 12-14 package remains available for checkra1n-era devices

- Starts bundled BTstack through its launchd socket on rootless devices
- Fixes rootless BTstack startup on Dopamine by using the modern 3 Mbps H4 path
- Keeps BAA helpers under CarPlay Simulator client names on iOS 15+
- Re-signs rootless binaries during install with the device ldid
- Signs the bundled BTstack daemon with Bluetooth and IOKit entitlements
- Adds scaled iPhone-screen UI support for testing
- Keeps rootful and rootless package builds
